series_metadata.series_title: Safe At Home Legal Process Documents
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, subpoenas to produce documents, court orders, and law enforcement requests.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed, then destroy. If case is dismissed, without prejudice, retain one year after statute of limitations runs out, then destroy. If no case has been filed, retain for four (4) years, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed, then destroy. If case is dismissed, without prejudice, retain one year after statute of limitations runs out, then destroy. If no case has been filed, retain for four (4) years, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
